title: Blueprint Exchange
concept: A visual blueprint marketplace for agency developers where the first viewport is the primary start surface: image-rich blueprint cards, category navigation, search, and adjacent PR/GitHub/ZIP/URL starts sit beside a persistent split WordPress preview and editor.
focus: Blueprint marketplace as the first usable app screen
Split preview and editor for agency client-site testing
High-contrast black, white, and cyan technical palette
Adjacent launch channels for PRs, GitHub imports, ZIP bundles, saving, and Site Manager tools
flows: Browse, search, filter, select, inspect, and run Blueprint gallery entries
Start from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or imported .zip
Save temporary Playgrounds in browser storage or to a local directory with visible progress
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds, including rename and delete actions
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, blueprint editor, database tools, logs, and WordPress preview in a split workspace
Export to GitHub, download a .zip, download database.sqlite, copy Blueprint links, and download Blueprint bundles
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
